accommodations.text: Allow scheduled sensory breaks of up to five minutes.
accommodations.source_quote: Allow scheduled sensory breaks of up to five minutes.

accommodations.text: Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.
accommodations.source_quote: Do not penalize articulation errors in graded oral work.

accommodations.text: Permit brief movement breaks between tasks.
accommodations.source_quote: Permit brief movement breaks between tasks.

accommodations.text: Provide 50% extended time on reading-heavy assessments.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide 50% extended time on reading-heavy assessments.

accommodations.text: Check the daily planner for recorded homework before dismissal.
accommodations.source_quote: Check the daily planner for recorded homework before dismissal.

accommodations.text: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.
accommodations.source_quote: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.

accommodations.text: Break multi-step directions into chunked, numbered steps.
accommodations.source_quote: Break multi-step directions into chunked, numbered steps.

accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide a word bank for written-response items.

services.source_quote: Language processing support (group): 60 minutes per week; 30 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Unassigned.
Specialized academic instruction: 100 minutes per week; 50 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Special education teacher.

goals.text: Diego will solve two-step equations with 80% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.
goals.source_quote: Diego will solve two-step equations with 80% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.

goals.text: Given a grade-level passage, Aanya will decode multisyllabic words with 85% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.
goals.source_quote: Given a grade-level passage, Aanya will decode multisyllabic words with 85% accuracy on 4 of 5 probes.

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.

goals.text: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Accepts a change in routine in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Grace will accept a change in routine using a coping strategy in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
